positive: A symmetrical, stylized arrangement of bioluminescent flora and celestial elements, forming a circular mandala pattern. Depict intricate stylized ferns, glowing astral petals, and interwoven crescent moons rendered in deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and ethereal gold leaf accents. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau meets vaporwave, featuring ultra-clean silhouettes and sharp contrasts against a deep, velvety midnight background. Center composition, highly detailed, vector illustration aesthetic suitable for screen printing on apparel. Cinematic volumetric lighting, perfect radial symmetry.
